events.summary: Tier 2.2 pilot expansion: log initialized for in-flight feature (phase=implementation). Future multi-session events should be appended contemporaneously via scripts/append-feature-log.py rather than reconstructed from memory.

v1 implementation paused → archived to _v1/. Feature rebuilt from scratch as full PM cycle per user direction 2026-05-07. v1 partial-ship audit: NotificationService + NotificationPermissionPrimingView shipped + tested + merged but the priming view was never wired into navigation (UI-016) and NotificationService was never wired into app lifecycle. State rolled back to research phase.

Phase 0 research.md drafted. 5 sections covering v1 retrospective (UI-016 partial-ship anatomy), smart-reminders coexistence (3-of-3 type duplication, authorization gap), and 3-approach selection (recommended: Approach A — subsume into smart-reminders as enhancement). 5 OQs surfaced for PRD phase.

Phase 0 research.md revised after user direction 2026-05-07. Approach B (platform layer) selected — push-notifications-v2 owns auth + priming + dispatch + deep-link routing; smart-reminders becomes first consumer. work_type stays 'feature'. Added §6 Deep-Link Routing as first-class infra. New finding: smart-reminders' .fitMeReminderTapped broadcast has no consumer in the SwiftUI tree (silent partial-ship #2). 8 OQs surfaced for PRD.

Phase 0 Research approved by user 2026-05-07. Approach B (push-notifications-v2 as platform layer) selected; smart-reminders becomes first consumer. Deep-link routing scoped as first-class infrastructure (§6). Smart-reminders consumer-side adaptation filed as separate backlog enhancement, ships paired with v2.

Phase 1 PRD opened. Will write docs/product/prd/push-notifications.md (overwriting v1 PRD). Resolves 8 OQs surfaced in Phase 0 (priming trigger choice, readinessAlert cap bucket, v1 demolition strategy, file paths, case-study slot, URL grammar flat-vs-nested, Universal Links scope, registry registration timing).

PRD drafted at docs/product/prd/push-notifications.md (overwrites v1). 22 requirements (P0=14 / P1=4 / P2=4), 6 success metrics including new deep-link routing success rate (≥99% target). Analytics spec validated: 7 events (5 reused notification_permission_*, 1 reused notification_priming_shown, 1 new deep_link_routed); 5 v1 events scheduled for deletion. 8 OQs all resolved per user direction. v2 demolition list scoped to 4 HISTORICAL banner additions + 1 outright deletion (DeepLinkHandler.swift dead code).
Phase 1 PRD approved by user 2026-05-07. 22 requirements, 6 metrics with kill criteria, 7 analytics events validated, three-layer architecture locked, 8/8 OQs resolved.
Phase 2 Tasks opened. Decomposing 22 PRD requirements into ~16 implementable tasks with skill assignments, dependencies, effort estimates, and big.LITTLE complexity classification.

16 tasks drafted (T1-T16). Critical path: T1 → T3 → T6 → T14 → T15 → T16 (≈3.75d sequential). 7 P-core (opus, serial) + 9 E-core (sonnet, parallel). Total effort 6.75d (≈1 calendar week with parallelism). Branching: feature/push-notifications-v2.
Phase 2 Tasks approved by user 2026-05-07. 16 tasks, 6.75d effort, 7 P-core / 9 E-core, critical path T1→T3→T6→T14→T15→T16.
Phase 3 UX/Integration opened (has_ui=true, work_subtype=new_feature → /ux audit step 3a skipped, chain starts at /ux research).

ux-research.md drafted. 8 of 13 ux-foundations principles applicable; 4 v2-specific UX scopes (priming surface, deep-link trust contract, readinessAlert content, post-denial banner); 4 user flows mapped (primary, skip, denial, edge cases); 4 competitor patterns analyzed for deep-link routing reliability.

ux-spec.md drafted (replaces v1, archived to _v1/). 4 user flows, 4 screen surfaces, low-fi + hi-fi + composite wireframes, complete state matrix, 8 of 13 principles applied, accessibility spec, token references pre-validated (zero new tokens needed).

ux-validate report written. Nielsen 38/40 (95%); 11/11 applicable ux-foundations principles pass; state coverage complete; accessibility complete at /ux level. 0 blocking, 0 should-fix, 2 acknowledged P2-deferred (already in PRD).

ux-preflight P0 gate PASS. 20/20 tokens resolve, 5/5 existing components resolve, 4 planned-new components flagged, 3/3 patterns attested. 1 P1 finding (WorkoutResultsView → SessionCompletionSheet) auto-corrected pre-publish. Cache entry written to .claude/cache/_shared/ux-spec-preflight.json.

/design preflight P0 gate PASS. Figma MCP live (whoami returned regev.ba@gmail.com Pro). Library accessible (file 0Ai7s3fCFqR5JXDW8JvgmD metadata returned canvas root). Token compliance + WCAG AA + motion all clean (delegates to /ux preflight). 4 P2 findings: net-new Figma nodes to be created at /design build step 3j (priming sheet, denial banner, Settings row, 2 readinessAlert variants). Bridge status updated.

/design audit Phase 3 compliance gateway PASS. Token + component + pattern + accessibility + motion all clean. ui-audit scanner: 0 findings on currently-scannable code (priming view skipped due to HISTORICAL marker; T4 removes it). 4 new components justified as platform-layer additions per design-system evolution rule.

/ux prompt + /design prompt complete. Two handoff prompts written to docs/prompts/{ux,ui}/2026-05-07-push-notifications-{ux,design}-build.md — paired with matching filename prefixes. Ready for /design build (step 3j) or external receiving agent.

/design build COMPLETED. New Figma page 'Push Notifications v2' (936:2) created with 4 mobile-preview surface cards in 2×2 grid: PrimingView sheet (937:6) + Settings → Notifications row 3 states (937:46) + SettingsDeepLinkBanner (938:2) + readinessAlert high+low banners (938:50). Smart Reminders page 907:2 untouched per platform-vs-consumer separation. Iterations: 2 (sizing-mode fix needed on first pass). Node IDs captured to state.json.figma_node_ids; row added to docs/design-system/figma-code-sync-status.md.

Phase 3 approved by user 2026-05-07. All 8 chain steps complete: ux-research/spec/validate/preflight (P0 PASS) + design-preflight (P0 PASS, MCP live) + design-audit (PASS) + ux-prompt + design-prompt + design-build (4 frames built on new Figma page 936:2; 2 iterations).
Phase 4 Implementation opened. 16 tasks scoped (T1-T16, 6.75d effort). Branch feature/push-notifications-v2. Starting T1 (NotificationGateway) — critical-path foundation.

T1 NotificationGateway shipped. 156 LOC. @MainActor singleton. Single dispatch surface with NotificationTag (.standard | .critical) + DispatchResult (.dispatched | .denied_unauthorized | .suppressed(reason:)). Standard cap 3/day; critical cap 1/day independent; quiet hours 22:00-07:00 (matches smart-reminders ReminderScheduler). UserDefaults-backed day-keyed counters. Test seam #if DEBUG. Branch: feature/push-notifications-v2.

T2 NotificationConsumerRegistry shipped. 95 LOC. @MainActor singleton. Idempotent register() with collision detection (rejects different-ID registration claiming an existing URL pattern). Lookups: by ID, by URL (prefix match), by type identifier. allURLPatterns() for /ux preflight enumeration.

T11 + T12 analytics taxonomy edits shipped. T11: deleted 5 unused v1 AnalyticsEvent declarations (notificationScheduled/Delivered/Tapped/Dismissed/Disabled). T12: added notificationSettingsDeeplinkShown + deepLinkRouted events; added 5 new AnalyticsParam keys (triggerContext, deepLinkSource, destination, urlPattern, outcome); added 7 new rows to analytics-taxonomy.csv (priming_shown/skipped, permission_requested/granted/denied, settings_deeplink_shown, deep_link_routed).

T3 DeepLinkRouter shipped. 217 LOC. @MainActor singleton. @Published pendingDeepLink: DeepLinkAction? — observable by SwiftUI root. Pure URL → DeepLinkAction resolver supports 4 nested verb-noun grammars (fitme://nav, ://action, ://auth, ://settings). Idempotent dedup (200ms window per URL+source). Auth URLs forward to existing SignInService.handleIncomingURL via authHandler closure. Test seam #if DEBUG. Plus AnalyticsService extensions: 4 new log* methods (logNotificationPrimingShown/Skipped/SettingsDeeplinkShown/DeepLinkRouted); 2 obsolete methods (logNotificationScheduled/Tapped) removed cleanly (zero external callers).

T4 NotificationPermissionPrimingView revived. HISTORICAL banner removed. Body refactored from v1: now wires NotificationGateway.shared (not the v1 NotificationService), takes triggerContext (postWorkout/settings) parameter for analytics, fires logNotificationPrimingShown on appear + logNotificationPrimingSkipped on Not-now + logNotificationPermissionRequested/Result on OS dialog flow. Edge case handled (already-granted-via-Settings auto-dismiss). New private sub-components: CategoryListView (3 bullets) + DenialHintRow.

T5 ReadinessAlertObserver shipped. 156 LOC. @MainActor singleton. Static consumerRegistration declares its consumer entry for NotificationConsumerRegistry. evaluate(_:ReadinessResult) gates: threshold (≥80 high / ≤40 low) → confidence (≥.medium = 2+ HK signals) → de-dupe (one per direction per local day, UserDefaults-backed). Cap routing per PRD PN-10: low+workout-today=.critical, else .standard. Test seam #if DEBUG. Workout-scheduled-today predicate is injectable closure (T6 wires real impl).

T6 FitTrackerApp + RootTabView wiring shipped. New FirstWorkoutTrigger service (50 LOC, posts .fitMeFirstWorkoutCompleted once per device install). FitTrackerApp.swift edits: (1) injected DeepLinkRouter analytics + authHandler in .task; (2) registered ReadinessAlertObserver consumer; (3) refreshed authorization on launch; (4) routed all .onOpenURL through DeepLinkRouter.handle (auth URLs still forward to SignInService via DeepLinkRouter.authHandler closure); (5) added .onReceive(.fitMeFirstWorkoutCompleted) listener that triggers priming sheet when !isAuthorized; (6) added .sheet(isPresented:) presenting PrimingView with .postWorkout context. RootTabView.swift edit: .onChange(of: deepLinkRouter.pendingDeepLink) drives tab navigation for .navigateToTab actions, then consume()s. TrainingPlanView v2 onDone callback now calls FirstWorkoutTrigger.mark().

T7+T8+T9+T10 batch shipped. T7 (NotificationPermissionRow.swift NEW + SettingsView v2 insertion) — 3-state dynamic Settings row (Enable/Open Settings/Enabled✓) using @AppStorage permission_requested flag for State 2 routing. T8 (SettingsDeepLinkBanner.swift NEW) — one-time post-denial banner per ux-spec §2.2 with reduce-motion-gated transition. T9 — HISTORICAL banner headers added to 3 v1 files (NotificationService, NotificationPreferencesStore, NotificationContentBuilder). T10 — DeepLinkHandler.swift (the dead 14-LOC targetTab one) deleted; verified zero callers pre-delete.

T13 + T14 + T15 + T16 batch shipped. T13 (4 unit test files, ~28 cases): NotificationGatewayTests, DeepLinkRouterTests, NotificationConsumerRegistryTests, ReadinessAlertTriggerTests. T14 (PushNotificationsReachabilityTests, 3 cases): codifies v1 UI-016 lesson — first-workout-trigger fires once + every URL routes + notification-source end-to-end. T15: pbxproj surgery shipped (7 new app files + 5 new test files added; 1 dead file deleted; 4 v1 files removed from Sources but kept in repo as HISTORICAL; v1 NotificationTests.swift also marked HISTORICAL); xcodebuild build target ** BUILD SUCCEEDED **. T16: notification_platform_v2 profile entry added to runtime-smoke-config.json with 11-step manual sim run procedure (manual_run: true; XCUITest deferred per env-flake concern). One real bug caught: ReadinessResult.score → ReadinessResult.overallScore typo, fixed.

Phase 4 Implementation approved by user 2026-05-07. 16/16 tasks complete. ~1850 LOC net-new (1174 platform + 567 tests + 110 wiring/edits). Build target ✓. Test target ✓. All 36 v2 tests pass at runtime (including 2 new analytics-firing cases for deep_link_routed succeeded/failed outcomes — closes Phase 5 analytics gate). Branch feature/push-notifications-v2 ready for Phase 6 review.

Phase 5 Testing opened — implementation tests already pass (xcodebuild build + test SUCCEEDED). Analytics verification gate satisfied via 2 MockAnalyticsAdapter assertions on deep_link_routed event with succeeded + failed_no_pattern_match outcomes.

Phase 5 Testing approved 2026-05-07. CI: build ✓, test ✓ (FitTrackerCoreTests + SyncMergeTests). v2 isolated test run: 36 cases all pass (10 DeepLinkRouter + 7 Gateway + 7 Registry + 7 ReadinessAlertTrigger + 3 Reachability + 2 analytics-firing). analytics_verification_passed=true.
Phase 6 Review opened. Branch feature/push-notifications-v2 ready for /dev review + /ux pre-merge-review + /design pre-merge-review (the v4.X UI-specific Phase 6 layer).

Phase 6 review chain complete. Step 6a code review: APPROVED (LOW risk; no high-risk surface touched; 1 bug caught+fixed during build). Step 6b /ux pre-merge-review: PASSED (spec-vs-code matrix 16/16 ✓; zero drift; one minor improvement on AppSize.iconBadge fix-as-you-touch). Step 6c /design pre-merge-review: PASSED (ui-audit P0=0 P1=0 on all v2 view files; 6/6 figma_node_ids recorded; build+test SUCCEEDED). state.json.pre_merge_review.ux=passed AND .design=passed → Phase 7 Merge approvable.

Phase 6 Review approved by user 2026-05-07. All 3 gates passed (code review, /ux pre-merge-review, /design pre-merge-review). state.json.pre_merge_review.{ux,design} = passed. Branch feature/push-notifications-v2 ready for merge.

v1 implementation phase retroactively logged for the _v1/ archive. v1 was paused 2026-04-27 in current_phase=implementation per UI-016 reopen + v7.7 freeze; archived to .claude/features/push-notifications/_v1/ on 2026-05-07 when v2 rebuild approved. This event satisfies the schema check on the archive file's current_phase=implementation value.
events.retroactive_reason: v1 archive — current_phase value preserved from 2026-04-27 paused snapshot; logging now to satisfy v7.6 PHASE_TRANSITION_NO_LOG schema check on the staged _v1/state.json file
